title: ASR Outdoor 7pc Gold Panning Kit 1/2 Mesh Classifier, 14" 10" Green Gold Pans, 2
description:
The ASR Outdoor 7 Piece Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan, sift, pick up and store gold and gems! Inside the kit, you’ll find a sifting classifier, 2 dual riffle gold sifting pans, a snifter bottle, 2 glass collection vials, and a magnifying tweezer. The classifier included has a mesh size of 1/2”, making it a great size for sifting coarser materials. It has a wire thickness of 1.4mm and is constructed of heavy-duty plastic that is designed to fit easily on a standard 5-gallon bucket. Each kit comes with 2 deep dual riffle sifting pans in 2 sizes: 14” diameter and 10” diameter. The pans both fit neatly inside of the sifter, and the green color makes it easier to spot gold flakes in silt and sand

ASR Outdoor 7pc Gold Panning Kit 1/2 Mesh Classifier, 14" 10" Green Gold Pans, 2

The ASR Outdoor 7 Piece Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan, sift, pick up and store gold and gems! Inside the kit, you’ll find a sifting classifier, 2 dual riffle gold sifting pans, a snifter bottle, 2 glass collection vials, and a magnifying tweezer.

The classifier included has a mesh size of 1/2”, making it a great size for sifting coarser materials. It has a wire thickness of 1.4mm and is constructed of heavy-duty plastic that is designed to fit easily on a standard 5-gallon bucket.

Key Features

  • GOLD PANNING ESSENTIAL TOOLS – The ASR Outdoor 7 Piece Gold Prospecting kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan, sift, pick up and store gold and gems! Inside the kit you’ll find a sifting classifier, 2 dual riffle gold sifting pans, a snifter bottle, 2 glass collection vials and a magnifying tweezer.
  • 1/2” CLASSIFYING SIFTER – The classifier included has a mesh size of 1/2”, making it a great size for sifting coarser materials. It has a wire thickness of 1.4mm, and is constructed of heavy-duty plastic that is designed to fit easily on a standard 5 gallon bucket.
  • DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS – Each kit comes with 2 deep dual riffle sifting pans in 2 sizes: 14” diameter and 10” diameter. The pans both fit neatly inside of the sifter, and the green color makes it easier to spot gold flakes in silt and sand.
  • COLLECTION TOOLS – The last 4 accessories included in this kit are the glass collection vials, the magnifying tweezer and the snifter bottle, all which will assist you in picking up, inspecting and storing your findings. The tweezer features a 4X magnification power and the 4oz snifter bottle can be used to pick up gold flakes.
  • SPECIFICATIONS – 7 piece kit; Materials: glass, plastic, steel; Colors: assorted; Items included: 1 classifier, 2 gold pans, 2 glass vials, 1 magnifying tweezer, 1 snifter bottle (4 fluid ounce volume)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROGPK7PC22
  • UPC: 810058483522
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 7pc

Each kit comes with 2 deep dual riffle sifting pans in 2 sizes: 14” diameter and 10” diameter. The pans both fit neatly inside of the sifter, and the green color makes it easier to spot gold flakes in silt and sand.

The last 4 accessories included in this kit are the glass collection vials, the magnifying tweezer, and the snifter bottle, all of which will assist you in picking up, inspecting, and storing your findings. The tweezer features a 4X magnification power and the 4oz snifter bottle can be used to pick up gold flakes.

This complete gold panning kit is a great gift idea for all types of prospectors, whether they are just starting out or are expert gold panners. Teaching children how to prospect is also a wonderful way to spend quality time outdoors while learning a new skill. Make sure to grab this set for yourself or a friend who loves gold panning – it just might pay off!
